since_last: 64% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +3.96%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.15% · BTC +1.44% · Gold +1.95% · Nasdaq100 -0.82%. 64% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +3.96%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +3.96%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -2.61%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +10.79%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +10.79%, META +9.13%, RXRX +8.17%, APP +7.18%, PLTR +6.99%. Laggards: TER -6.54%, KLAC -6.45%, MU -6.41%, LRCX -6.09%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.61% at $162.99
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.61% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
